[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001100 3
1 00101101 4
2 00101101 4
3 01110001 4
4 00001111 4
5 00000000 a
6 10000100 2
7 00000000 a

01 10 00000000 a match 5 7
12 21 00000000 a match 5 7
23 32 01000000 1
34 43 00001100 2
45 54 00101101 4 match 1 2
56 65 00100001 2
67 76 00000001 1
70 07 00000100 1

02 20 10000000 1
13 31 00000000 a match 5 7
24 42 00100000 1
35 53 00001100 2
46 64 00100001 2
57 75 00001101 3
60 06 00000000 a match 5 7
71 17 00000000 a match 5 7

03 30 00000100 1
14 41 00000000 a match 5 7
25 52 00100000 1
36 63 01000000 1
47 74 00001101 3
50 05 00000100 1
61 16 00000000 a match 5 7
72 27 00000010 1

04 40 00000100 1
15 51 00000000 a match 5 7
26 62 01100000 2
37 73 00001100 2
